delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
Weekly English group communication/presentation ability using information technology.
Working in groups weekly explaining/presenting ideas to related topics (information technology, the computer, AI)
aims: Have fun improving your English communication/presentation ability using the computer & English.
goals:
Students will be able to convey complex technical data in English using basic information structures.
Students will develop practical communicative presentation competence & learn to express more scientific ideas in English.

Students will be able to create English language presentations.
Students will be able to explain/communicate & give SHORT PRESENTATIONS expressing themselves using technical/informational/computer-related ENGLISH.

Students will be able to have simple, informal conversations which are important to building international relationships.
Students will understand and be able to communicate information about technology and daily topics in English.

plan.text:
Introduction/ Class Orientation
Written/Spoken Self-introduction about your interest in computers/future career

Computers/History
Search the Internet for data on history of computers
Preparation/Research on computer history: choose one thing of interest for presentation
SDGs industry, innovation & infrastructure

Computer Presentation
Powerpoint/Spoken Computer PRESENTATION
Make powerpoint/EXCEL chart using data on computer history

Numbers/Computer Data
Write/Ask/Answer 5-10 original interesting questions with numerical answers
SDGs Quality Education

Units of Measurement
Write/Talk about measurements
Field Work: measure various items/answer questions
Write 5-10 questions with numerical answers

Shapes/Sizes
Write about hi-tech object in detail (size/shape)
Write questions about the size/shape of various things
SDGs responsible consumption & production

Hi-tech Objects
Make powerpoint/EXCEL chart about hi-tech object
Write questions/answers about a hi-tech object

Describing Materials
Write/Talk about what materials various things are made of/from
SDGs responsible consumption & production
Hi-tech Object group MID-TERM PRESENTATION preparation

Functions/Use
Write/Talk about how/who/why we use different things/computers

Hi-tech Object / ROBOT PRESENTATION
Write about your daily schedule

Daily Schedules using Technology
Listen/Write/Talk about daily schedules
Choose/Write questions for a survey

Survey: Frequency/Amounts Questions
Write Survey questions
Finish writing survey questions Make PIE charts

Take a Survey
Ask 20-100 people survey questions/Tally survey results(answers)
SDGs partnership to achieve goals

Review/Preparation for final group EXAM PRESENTATION
Write 10 sentences analyzing survey results

textbooks:
Original class materials will be posted on the KU moodle site [https://moodle.kochi-u.ac.jp/2026/] or handed out in class.
Reference Paul Daniels textbook 2017
prereq:
Successful completion of basic general education Eikaiwa I & II (speaking/conversation) as a 1st-year student at Kochi University & Science (I.T./ computer) major.
The course is taught in English at a Post Elementary level. It is assumed that students have some basic English communication skills, so students must be ready to try to function in English and improve on their basic communication/presentation skills.
prep:
Students are expected to practice English skills and prepare for all classes.
Practice outside of the classroom is essential.
teachers: ◎ フェビアン ポーラ ダイアン

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
専門分野に関する知識
論理的思考力
課題探求力
情報に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力
協働実践力
自律力
統合・働きかけ

extra.label:
履修に係わる注意事項
【NOTES ON CLASS ENROLLMENT】
extra.text:
It is very important to ATTEND class regularly (**MAX 3 absences), especially the 1st lesson introduction.
Students are expected to ACTIVELY PARTICIPATE in every class.

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
50%: 20% In-class Work/Participation/Effort/Attitude [**MAX 3 absences] + 30% Homework/preparation [moodle]
50%: 30% Presentations + 20% Final Survey EXAM PRESENTATION

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
extra.text:
有
教員の実務経験との関連
Have worked as a teacher; teaching in kindergarten, elementary school NPO summer programs, junior & senior high school, vocational schools, cram schools, language schools & university. Before teaching, I worked for a small company in public relations/marketing & advertising. Over the years have volunteered or worked in/with NPO groups.

extra.label: 授業形態
extra.text:
講義形式が中心
口頭での質疑やディスカッションを含む
授業中や授業時間外のグループワークを含む
その他
Some classes will meet online or on demand on moodle
